description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image, with a before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install apt-transport-https -yqq, and java -version. Define a cache for /root/.gradle/. Add a build job that runs chmod +x gradlew, then ./gradlew setupCIWorkspace build uploadArchives, creates an artifacts directory, copies build/libs/* into artifacts/, and finally sends a Discord webhook notification with curl using the MESSAGE, NAME, and IMG variables. Set the variables IMG to "https://cdn.discordapp.com/icons/131019825681006592/9df46a9d968c06e8eb264c590cc23a43.jpg", MESSAGE to "$CI_PROJECT_NAME build $CI_BUILD_ID successful: $(git log -1 --pretty=%B)", and NAME to "Builds stalker". Configure the job to publish the artifacts/ directory as an artifact.
